manifest.description: Direct integration with Llama.cpp (via llama-cpp-python) to run GGUF models with GPU (Metal/CUDA) and CPU support. Includes session management with ModelPool and prefix caching.

config.model_path_empty: LlamaCppConfig: model_path is empty. Configure NEXE_LLAMA_CPP_MODEL or pass model_path.
config.loaded: LlamaCppConfig loaded: model={model}, n_ctx={n_ctx}, n_batch={n_batch}, gpu_layers={gpu_layers}, threads={threads}, mlock={mlock}, mmap={mmap}, flash_attn={flash_attn}
config.chat_format_unrecognized: LlamaCppConfig: chat_format '{chat_format}' not recognized. Valid formats: {valid_formats}

logs.config_validation_failed: LlamaCppModule: Configuration validation failed. Module started in degraded mode.
logs.pool_creating_instance: ModelPool: creating new instance for session {session}
logs.pool_hash_changed: ModelPool: hash changed for session {session}, resetting
logs.pool_loading_model: ModelPool: loading model {model} (n_ctx={n_ctx}, n_batch={n_batch}, gpu_layers={gpu_layers}, mlock={mlock}, mmap={mmap}, flash_attn={flash_attn})
logs.pool_reusing_instance: ModelPool: reusing instance for session {session} (hash match)
logs.sessions_destroyed: LlamaCppChatNode: all sessions destroyed via pool
logs.timing: LlamaCppChatNode: {cache} in {elapsed_ms}ms (p:{prefill_ms} g:{generation_ms}), {tps:.1f} tok/s, prompt={prompt_tokens}, gen={gen_tokens}
